name: Ace & Newgate
effect: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may reveal 1 card with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates" from your hand: Draw 1 card and place the revealed card at the top of your deck.

name: Izo
effect: [On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 card with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates" other than [Izo] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order. [On Your Opponent's Attack] You may trash this Character: Draw 1 card and place 1 card from your hand at the bottom of your deck.

name: Edward.Newgate
effect: [Double Attack] [On Play] Reveal 1 card from the top of your deck. If that card's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates", draw 2 cards.

name: Kouzuki Oden
effect: If this Character would be removed from the field by your opponent's effect, you may trash 2 cards from your hand instead. [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may rest 3 of your DON!! cards and return 1 of your Characters other than this Character to the owner's hand: Set this Character as active. Land of Wano/Kouzuki Clan/Whitebeard Pirates

name: Jozu
effect: [On Play] Reveal 1 card from the top of your deck. If that card's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates", draw 2 cards and trash 1 card from your hand.

name: Squard
effect: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Reveal 1 card from the top of your deck. If that card's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates", give up to 1 rested DON!! card to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.

name: Vista
effect: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.) Koushi Rokushiro

name: Whitey Bay
effect: [Your Turn] [On Play] You may reveal 2 cards with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates" from your hand: Up to 1 of your Leader with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates" gains +2000 power during this turn. Koushi Rokushiro

name: Marco
effect: [Once Per Turn] If this Character would be K.O.'d by your opponent's effect, you may trash 1 card from your hand instead. [When Attacking] Reveal 1 card from the top of your deck. If that card's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates", this Character gains +1000 power until the end of your opponent's next turn.

name: Take That Back!! Take Back What You Said!!
